tests.result: Component schedule is explicit, but unresolved physical/contract ownership prevents independent proof of every overlap control.
Material risk remains wherever gross acreage or project economics cannot be traced to one share.
Modeled reserves exist, but enforceable remaining-capital and financing terms are incomplete.
Low/base/high dispersion remains sensitive to duration, unit values, and realization discounts.
Residual risk remains and must not be converted into an approved recommendation.

residual_risks: No public executed Alpha Digital agreement discloses LB's net economics.
Public disclosure does not fully separate recurring fee growth from price, mix, acquisitions, and one-time activity across a cycle.
A complete per-share Up-C, NCI, tax-distribution, debt, and future-dilution waterfall remains outstanding.
strongest_failure_path: Acquisition and activity-driven fee growth is mistaken for durable organic economics; debt and share issuance fund expansion while digital projects remain uncontracted and the premium multiple compresses.
